name: Jain (Deemed-to-be University)
description: Granted Deemed-to-be University status in 2009. Located in Bengaluru. Evolved from Sri Bhagawan Mahaveer Jain College, established in 1990.
history_summary: Online programmes are delivered through Online JAIN. As a Deemed-to-be University, AICTE approval applies to online MBA and MCA programmes per regulation.
known_for: Operates multiple constituent schools across business, engineering, sciences, and humanities.

name: Sikkim Manipal University
description: Founded in 1995 in Sikkim as a State Private University. Established as a public-private partnership between the Government of Sikkim and the Manipal Group.
history_summary: Online programmes are delivered through Online Manipal. As a State Private University, AICTE is not legally required for online MBA per UGC guidelines, though SMU's online MCA programme holds explicit AICTE approval.
known_for: First public-private partnership university model in India. Operates Sikkim Manipal Institute of Medical Sciences alongside engineering and management programmes.

name: Shoolini University of Biotechnology and Management Sciences
description: Founded in 2009 in Solan, Himachal Pradesh, as a State Private University, established under the Himachal Pradesh state Act.
history_summary: Online programmes are delivered through Shoolini Online. As a State Private University, AICTE is not legally required for online MBA per UGC guidelines.
known_for: Originally established with a focus on biotechnology, pharmacy, and applied life sciences.

name: Andhra University
description: Founded in 1926 in Visakhapatnam by an Act of the Madras Presidency. State Public University. One of the older universities in southern India, predating Indian independence.
history_summary: Online programmes are delivered through the Directorate of Distance Education. As a State Public University, AICTE is not legally required for online MBA per UGC guidelines.
known_for: A teaching, residential, and affiliating university with constituent colleges across coastal Andhra Pradesh.

name: Manipal Academy of Higher Education
description: Founded in 1953 in Manipal, Karnataka. Granted Deemed-to-be University status. Granted Institution of Eminence status by the Government of India in 2018.
history_summary: Online programmes are delivered through the Online Manipal platform, alongside Manipal University Jaipur and Sikkim Manipal University. Each is a legally separate UGC-DEB approved university.
known_for: Originally established as a medical college (Kasturba Medical College). Programmes have since expanded to include engineering, management, and life sciences.

name: Christ (Deemed to be University)
description: Granted Deemed-to-be University status in 2008. Located in Bengaluru. Evolved from Christ College, established in 1969 by the Carmelites of Mary Immaculate (CMI).
history_summary: As a Deemed-to-be University, AICTE approval applies to online MBA and MCA programmes per regulation.
known_for: Operates multiple campuses across Bengaluru, Delhi NCR, and Pune. Programmes span commerce, management, humanities, and sciences.

name: JSS Academy of Education and Research
Alagappa University
description: Founded in 1985 in Karaikudi, Tamil Nadu, by an Act of the Tamil Nadu state legislature. State Public University.
history_summary: Online programmes are delivered through the Directorate of Distance Education. As a State Public University, AICTE is not legally required for online MBA per UGC guidelines.
known_for: Operates as a teaching and affiliating university with a distance education programme.

name: University of Madras
description: Founded in 1857 in Chennai, Tamil Nadu. State Public University. One of the three oldest universities in India, established alongside the Universities of Calcutta and Bombay.
history_summary: Online programmes are delivered through the Institute of Distance Education. As a State Public University, AICTE is not legally required for online MBA per UGC guidelines.
known_for: Affiliates colleges across northern Tamil Nadu. Operates the Institute of Distance Education.

name: Amrita Vishwa Vidyapeetham University
description: Founded in 2003 with headquarters in Coimbatore, Tamil Nadu, as a Deemed-to-be University. Operates campuses in Coimbatore, Bengaluru, Kochi, Mysore, Amritapuri, Chennai, and Faridabad.
history_summary: Online programmes are delivered through Amrita Online. As a Deemed-to-be University, AICTE approval applies to online MBA and MCA per regulation.
known_for: Established with engineering, medical sciences, and Sanskrit-related programmes.

name: Symbiosis International
description: Granted Deemed-to-be University status in 2002. Located in Pune. The Symbiosis Society itself was established in 1971.
history_summary: Online programmes are delivered through Symbiosis Centre for Distance Learning (SCDL) and Symbiosis Centre for Online and Digital Learning. As a Deemed-to-be University, AICTE approval applies to online MBA and MCA per regulation.
known_for: Operates multiple constituent institutes across India.

name: Bharati Vidyapeeth
description: Granted Deemed-to-be University status in 1996. Headquartered in Pune, Maharashtra. Evolved from Bharati Vidyapeeth, an educational society founded in 1964 by Patangrao Kadam.
history_summary: Online programmes include MBA, MCA, BBA, BCA, and BCom. As a Deemed-to-be University, AICTE approval applies to online MBA and MCA per regulation.
known_for: Operates constituent institutes across medicine, dentistry, engineering, management, and computer applications.

name: Dr. D.Y. Patil Vidyapeeth (Pune)
description: Founded in 2003. Located in Pune as a Deemed-to-be University. Part of the broader D.Y. Patil education family, which includes multiple legally distinct institutions across Pune, Mumbai, and Navi Mumbai.
history_summary: Online programmes include MBA and MCA at the postgraduate level. As a Deemed-to-be University, AICTE approval applies to online MBA and MCA per regulation.
known_for: Originally established with a focus on medicine and dentistry. Programmes have since expanded to include biotechnology, management, and computer applications.

name: Vellore Institute of Technology
description: Founded in 1984 as Vellore Engineering College. Granted Deemed-to-be University status in 2001. Operates campuses in Vellore, Chennai, Bhopal, Amaravati, and Andhra Pradesh.
history_summary: Online programmes are delivered through VIT Online (VITOL). As a Deemed-to-be University, AICTE approval applies to online MBA and MCA per regulation.
known_for: Originally established as an engineering college. Admissions to on-campus engineering programmes are conducted through the VITEEE entrance exam.

name: Bharath Institute of Higher Education and Research
B.S Abdur Rahman Institute of Science and Technology
Sathyabama Institute of Science and Technology
Kalasalingam Academy of Research and Higher Education
Hindustan Institute of Technology and Science (HITS)
Karunya Institute of Technology and Sciences
Meenakshi Academy of Higher Education and Research
Jamia Hamdard
description: Granted Deemed-to-be University status in 1989. Located in New Delhi. Evolved from the Hamdard Foundation established by Hakim Abdul Hameed.
history_summary: Online programmes are governed under UGC-DEB. As a Deemed-to-be University, AICTE approval applies to online MBA and MCA programmes per regulation.
known_for: Originally established with a focus on Unani medicine and pharmacy education. Programmes have since expanded to include management, computer applications, and Islamic studies.

name: Bharathiar University
description: Founded in 1982 in Coimbatore, Tamil Nadu, by an Act of the Tamil Nadu state legislature. Named after the Tamil poet Subramania Bharati. State Public University.
history_summary: Online programmes are delivered through the School of Distance Education. As a State Public University, AICTE is not legally required for online MBA per UGC guidelines.
known_for: Affiliates colleges across western Tamil Nadu and runs a distance education programme.

name: Vignan's Foundation for Science, Technology and Research
Guru Jambheshwar University of Science and Technology
Kurukshetra University
description: Founded in 1956 in Kurukshetra, Haryana, by an Act of the Punjab state legislature. Became part of Haryana following state reorganisation in 1966. State Public University.
history_summary: Online programmes are delivered through the Directorate of Distance Education. As a State Public University, AICTE is not legally required for online MBA per UGC guidelines.
known_for: Affiliates colleges across northern Haryana and runs a distance education centre.

name: Shree Guru Gobind Singh Tricentenary University
Mody University of Science and Technology
Narsee Monjee Institute of Management Studies (NMIMS)
description: Founded in 1981 in Mumbai. Granted Deemed-to-be University status in 2003. Operates as SVKM's Narsee Monjee Institute of Management Studies under the Shri Vile Parle Kelavani Mandal trust.
history_summary: Online programmes are delivered through NMIMS Global Access School. As a Deemed-to-be University, AICTE approval applies to online MBA and MCA programmes per regulation.
known_for: Originally established as a management institute, with the School of Business Management as its founding school.

name: Chandigarh University
description: Founded in 2012 in Mohali, Punjab. State Private University, established under the Punjab State Legislative Assembly. Part of the broader CU Group.
history_summary: Online programmes are delivered through CU Online. As a State Private University, AICTE approval is not legally required for online MBA and MCA per UGC guidelines.
known_for: Programmes span engineering, management, law, computer applications, and pharmacy.

name: Manipal University
description: Founded in 2011 in Rajasthan as a State Private University, established under the Rajasthan state legislature Act. Part of the Manipal Education Group but a legally separate entity from Manipal Academy of Higher Education in Karnataka.
history_summary: Online programmes are delivered through Online Manipal alongside MAHE and Sikkim Manipal. As a State Private University, AICTE is not legally required for online MBA per UGC guidelines.
known_for: Operates as the Rajasthan campus of the Manipal brand.

name: Amity University Rajasthan
description: Amity offers online programmes through two separate UGC-DEB approved universities: Amity University Uttar Pradesh (Noida), founded in 2005, and Amity University Rajasthan (Jaipur). Both are State Private Universities.
history_summary: Different online programmes are approved by different Amity entities. The approving entity issues your degree certificate. Confirm which Amity entity approves your specific programme before enrolling.
known_for: The Amity Education Group operates multiple universities across Indian states, established by the Ritnand Balved Education Foundation.

name: Lovely Professional University
description: Founded in 2005 in Punjab as a State Private University, established under an Act of the Punjab state legislature.
history_summary: Online programmes are delivered through LPU Online. As a State Private University, AICTE approval is not legally required for online MBA and MCA per UGC guidelines.
known_for: Programmes span engineering, management, agriculture, design, and pharmacy.

name: Datta Meghe Institute of Higher Education and Research
Centurion University of Technology and Management
Amity University
description: Amity offers online programmes through two separate UGC-DEB approved universities: Amity University Uttar Pradesh (Noida), founded in 2005, and Amity University Rajasthan (Jaipur). Both are State Private Universities.
history_summary: Different online programmes are approved by different Amity entities. The approving entity issues your degree certificate. Confirm which Amity entity approves your specific programme before enrolling.
known_for: The Amity Education Group operates multiple universities across Indian states, established by the Ritnand Balved Education Foundation.

name: University of Petroleum and Energy Studies
description: Founded in 2003 in Dehradun, Uttarakhand. State Private University, established by an Act of the Uttarakhand State Legislature.
history_summary: Online programmes are delivered through UPES Online. As a State Private University, AICTE is not legally required for online MBA per UGC guidelines.
known_for: Originally founded with a focus on the energy and petroleum sector. Programmes have since expanded to include engineering, management, design, and law.

name: Galgotias University
description: Founded in 2011 in Greater Noida, Uttar Pradesh, as a State Private University, established by an Act of the Uttar Pradesh state legislature. Evolved from Galgotias Educational Institutions.
history_summary: Online programmes are delivered through Galgotias Online. As a State Private University, AICTE is not legally required for online MBA per UGC guidelines.
known_for: Programmes span engineering, computer applications, and management.

name: Mangalayatan University
description: Founded in 2006 in Aligarh, Uttar Pradesh, as a State Private University, established under the Uttar Pradesh state legislature.
history_summary: Online programmes are delivered through Mangalayatan Online. As a State Private University, AICTE is not legally required for online MBA per UGC guidelines.
known_for: Operates with a wide range of UG and PG programmes including online and distance learning.

name: Dr. M.G.R. Educational and Research Institute
Shanmugha Arts, Science, Technology & Research Academy
S.R.M. Institute of Sciences and Technology
Vel's Institute of Science, Technology & Advanced Studies (VISTAS)
Sri Ramachandra Institute of Higher Education and Research
Manav Rachna International Institute of Research & Studies
Academy of Maritime Education and Training
